positiveClaims.docxExport: Targeted accepted minimal DOCX export through cmd.project.export.docxMin, canonical saved source, atomic buffer write, content order validation, and minimal mark validation.
positiveClaims.docxImport: Targeted accepted DOCX import preview accept open-scene flow using admitted preview plan, safe-create, tree refresh, and open created scene.
positiveClaims.markdownImport: Targeted accepted Markdown import through preview plus safe-create into an isolated scene with tree refresh and open-scene product parity checks.
positiveClaims.markdownExport: Targeted accepted Markdown export Save As primary path with saved-file proof, cancel as non-write, and fail-closed behavior without outPath and bytesWritten.
positiveClaims.mindmap: Mindmap remains derived runtime/status only and is not a user-facing export command or document truth.

explicitNonClaims: production picker coverage for Markdown export
production picker coverage for DOCX import

docsBinding.reason: CONTEXT and HANDOFF carry current factual anchors; BIBLE and CANON remain product map and binding invariants without stale MVP import/export claims.
